documentation.content: Métricas expostas em /metrics (Prometheus). Importar no Cloud Monitoring via URL do serviço Cloud Run ou OpenTelemetry sidecar. Métricas: dossie_pipeline_jobs_total, dossie_pipeline_duration_seconds, dossie_pipeline_findings_count.

text.content: Configure um scraper (Managed Prometheus ou Cloud Monitoring) contra `https://<cloud-run-url>/metrics`. Consulte `dossie_pipeline_jobs_total`.
